_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE TEMPLATE ONLY — not maintained compliance content.
name: pack:phi-hipaa
description: HIPAA PHI handling policy — HIGH risk. SME + auditor required; PHI scan + audit trail gates enforced.

rules.name: require_subject_matter_expert
rules.description: Subject-matter-expert must validate before any write to PHI data.

rules.name: require_auditor
rules.description: Auditor pre-execution and post-execution review required for HIPAA tasks.

rules.name: require_phi_scan_gate
rules.description: PHI scan gate must run before any PHI data is committed.

rules.name: require_audit_trail_gate
rules.description: Audit trail gate must run — every write must log who, when, what, why.

rules.name: block_phi_writes_non_implementing
rules.description: Block writes to PHI data directories except from the designated implementing agent.

rules.name: block_patient_data_writes
rules.description: Block writes to patient data directories.

rules.name: no_bash_on_phi
rules.description: Implementation agents may not use Bash on PHI data paths.

rules.name: append_only_health_records
rules.description: Health records are append-only — no updates, no deletes.
